name: Picante Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice 1/2 medium Jalapeno pepper and remove seeds.
2. Chop green peppers.
3. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
4. Blend on medium speed until the tomatoes are minced but not pureed.
5. Transfer mixture to a covered container and refrigerate for up to one month.
1. Dice 1/2 medium Jalapeno pepper and remove seeds.
2. Chop green peppers.
3. Add garlic powder (1/2 tsp) and onion powder (1/2 tsp) to the blender.
4. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
5. Blend on medium speed until the tomatoes are minced but not pureed.
6. Refrigerate in a covered container for up to one month.
